contracts.authority: Normalized NCBI BioC passage text and reviewed claim records are authoritative; benchmark labels and retrieval indexes are derived.
contracts.evidence_locator: Each hard-ground-truth citation uses a one-based BioC passage number, the deterministic Markdown path, and the SHA-256 of exact passage text.
contracts.qrels: Paper IDs are canonical uppercase PMCIDs, while source IDs are the corresponding lowercase manifest IDs for both paper and claim sources.
contracts.question_prompt: Only the question string is supplied to a consultation alternative; qrels, answer claims, derivations, negatives, and evidence hashes remain evaluator-only.
